task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Pre-spray boom calibration check' Activity log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Activity log titled 'Pre-spray boom calibration check' in the farmOS Field Kit app. It should be marked as Done (often indicated by a checkmark or status label). If visible, the notes should mention boom pressure and nozzle flow rate, and the time should be 7:30 AM.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Glyphosate application Field 3 North' Input log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Input log titled 'Glyphosate application Field 3 North' marked as Done. If visible, notes should mention Glyphosate, 2,4-D amine, and EPA Reg No 524-475, and the time should be 8:00 AM.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Azoxystrobin fungicide Field 3 South' Input log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Input log titled 'Azoxystrobin fungicide Field 3 South' marked as Done. If visible, notes should mention Azoxystrobin and propiconazole, and the time should be 10:30 AM.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Post-spray drift assessment' Observation log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Observation log titled 'Post-spray drift assessment' marked as NOT Done (pending/incomplete status). If visible, notes should mention minor drift and a 30-ft buffer, and the time should be 12:30 PM.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Sprayer rinse and storage' Activity log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Activity log titled 'Sprayer rinse and storage' marked as Done. If visible, notes should mention triple-rinse procedure, and the time should be 1:30 PM.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the farmOS Field Kit app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the genuine farmOS Field Kit Android app interface, not a text editor, notes app, or web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the logs were created via the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of navigating the app's menus, tapping the '+' button to add logs, and typing into the app's text fields, rather than using terminal commands to inject data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: 5 logs must be created in the farmOS Field Kit app: 1) Activity log 'Pre-spray boom calibration check' (Done). 2) Input log 'Glyphosate application Field 3 North' (Done). 3) Input log 'Azoxystrobin fungicide Field 3 South' (Done). 4) Observation log 'Post-spray drift assessment' (NOT Done). 5) Activity log 'Sprayer rinse and storage' (Done). The pass threshold is 80 points (4 of 5 logs). Technical details in log notes are accurate and should match the task description.
